rows.label: qev030104_MSG0001
rows.name:
Because of the torture I received from them,
my whole body is battered.
It looks like I won't be able to fight properly yet, da. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030104_MSG0002
rows.name:
I'm sorry... but please,
save the lives of our kin. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030104_MSG0003
rows.name:
To rescue every single one of them...
Magnificent! O wise one, like the Dolphera! [ST:wait ]
